HomePage.title: Courier Flow
HomePage.description: Dashboard for managing couriers, orders and deliveries

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.description: Create a client account to place and track deliveries.

password.label: Password
password.hint: Use at least 8 characters, including uppercase, lowercase, number and symbol.

acceptTerms.label: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>

validation.nameTooShort: Full name must contain at least 2 characters
validation.nameTooLong: Full name must not exceed 80 characters
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must contain at least 8 characters
validation.passwordLowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
validation.passwordSpecial: Password must contain a special character
validation.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

verifyEmail.title: Verify your email
verifyEmail.description: We've sent a verification link to your email address.
verifyEmail.descriptionWithEmail: We've sent a verification link to {email}.
verifyEmail.resent: A new verification email has been sent.

verifyPhone.title: Confirm your phone number
verifyPhone.description: We sent a {length}-digit verification code to your phone number.
verifyPhone.descriptionWithPhone: We sent a {length}-digit verification code to {phone}.
verifyPhone.resent: A new verification code has been sent.

code.label: Verification code
code.hint: Enter the code from the SMS message.

validation.codeDigitsOnly: The code must contain only digits
